raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I purchased a run online from XXXX XXXX in the amount of {$1000.00}. On XX/XX/XXXX the ring arrived. After wearing it for a few days my fiance broke out onto a really bad XXXX  and I contacted the company on XX/XX/XXXX to inform them what happened and asked for a refund. In addition the ring was sent back immediately. On XX/XX/XXXX the ring was confirmed to arrive back but no refund was giving dispute XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  my fiance had. I contacted my credit card company to file a dispute. A temp credit was giving but in XX/XX/XXXX the merchant responded and the credit was reversed. The company allowed me to respond again until XX/XX/XXXX but I spoke to them multiple times in the phone between then but no one notified me that I needed to submit this form by XX/XX/XXXX. The last person I talked to said there was no deadline so I submitted the signed form with information I already provided Before on XX/XX/XXXX and I was informed that I missed the deadline by 7 days and the dispute can not be reopened.
